results.title: Tata Steel Faces Summons from Dutch Authorities Over Alleged Pollution at IJmuiden Plant
results.description: Tata Steel Limited informs stock exchanges about summons received by its Dutch subsidiary TSIJ for alleged pollution. Company claims significant reduction in incidents and calls allegations unjustified.

results.title: Mike Commodore accuses Edmonton Oilers amid Mike Babcock controversy
results.description: Former NHL defenseman Mike Commodore has stirred the pot around the hockey world after saying the Edmonton Oilers sent him a threatening email as he continued to criticize head coach Mike Babcock. The claim has only added more heat to the ongoing public feud between Commodore and Babcock and sparked a conversation about social media wars involving NHL personalities and teams.

results.title: Chennai man arrested for assaulting, threating woman after refusing marriage
results.description: Chennai police arrested a 25-year-old man for assault and death threats after refusing marriage following a live-in relationship; case filed under BNS.
